title: District Transport Officer, Siaha in Puipunna leh lirthei chhunga meizial zuk khapna chungchanga mipui hriattur chhuah.
content:
973/2026-2027

Siaha the 12th June 2026:Siaha District Transport Officer Pu Vabeimozachhi Chozah chuan a hnuai tarlan ang hian puipunna leh lirthei chhunga meizial zuk khapna thupek chungchanga mipui hriattur a chhuah.

Kan hriat theuh angin lirthei chhunga meizuk hi a zu-tu mai bakah a chuang ve dangte hriselna tan pawh a him lo hle a, hemi avang hian kan ram dan hrang hrangah pawh lirthei chhunga meizuk khapna hi khauh taka hman a ni. Sub - Rule(b) of Rule 23 of the Mizoram Motor Vehicles Rules, 1996 in a sawi angin lirthei (Public Service Vehicle) chhunga meizial zuk hi khap tlat a ni a, hetianga ti luite chu dan anga hremna pek theih an ni. Public Service Vehicle (Bus, Maxicab, Taxi, Auto-Rickshaw etc) stand leh service lai emaw, puipunna hmun (Public Place) a mei zu emaw chu COTPA Section 21 hmangin Rs.200 thleng chawi tir theih an ni.

The Pröhibitatiön of Smöking in Püblic Places Rüles, 2008 hnuaia Rüle 3 chuan vantlang hmun (Public Place) neitu/enkawltu (Proprietor, Manager, Supervisor leh In-Charge) zawng zawng ten an thu neihna chhung vantlang hmun (Public Place) reng rengah meizuk khap a nih bakah meizial lam chi reng reng engmah chhawpchhuah lo tur a ni.

Tin, Secretary, STA in public vehicle a "No Smoking Sticker" tar chungchang thu a chhuah angin a hnuaia number tarlanahte hian dan bawhchhia-te chu a complain theih/tur a ni.

1. Vanlalrema (MVI) DTO(S) - 8731885169

2. MS Dawngliana (EI DTO(S) - 8256901687

3. James Remruata (ESI) DTO(S) - 9612790225

Attachment

title: Pi K. Vanlalruati, District Magistrate, Hnahthial District in dan ang ni lova Kuhva ro (Dry areca nuts) Hnahthial District chhunga lakluh khapna thupek a ti chhuak
content:
972/2026-2027

Dated Hnahthial the 12thJune, 2026:Pi K. Vanlalruati, District Magistrate, Hnahthial District,Hnahthial District chhung khawi hmunah mah dan ang ni lova kuhva ro lak luh leh phurhkhapna thupek a ti chhuak.

ORDER

(Under Section 163 of Bhartiya Nagarik Suraksha Sanhita, 2023)

Mizoram Sorkar Home Department atanga lehkha kan hmuh angin Kuhva ro (Dry areca nuts) hi dan ang ni lova lakluh khap tlat a ni a. Hnahthial District chhungah dan ang ni lova lak luh a nih loh nan a hnuaia tarlan ang hian khuahkhirhna thupek chhuah a tula hriat a ni.

Chuvangin, kei, K. VANLALRUATI, MCS, District Magistrate, Hnahthial District hian Section 163 of Bhartiya Nagarik Suraksha Sanhita, 2023- in thuneihna min pek angin thupek ka chhuah e:

"Hnahthial District chhung khawi hmunah mah dan ang ni lova kuhva ro lak luh leh phurh phal a ni lo"

He thupek zawm lo chu Section 223 of Bharatiya Nyaya Sanhita, 2023 dan hmangin hrem theih a ni ang.

He thupek hian tul bik thila tihdanglam a nih loh chuan tihchhuah a nih atanga thla 2 (hnih) chhung a huam ang.

He thupek hi Court Seal nemin vawiin, 10th June, 2026 hian hming ka ziah hnan e.

Sd/-

K. Vanlalruati

District Magistrate,

Hnahthial District, Hnahthial

Dated Hnahthial, the 10thJune, 2026

Attachment
